# View a Voice Memos transcription on iPhone

Speech in your audio recordings can be transcribed to text in Voice Memos. You can view the transcription while you’re recording or after.

_Note:_ Audio transcription is available on iPhone 12 or later in English (all variants), Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese. It’s not available in all countries or regions.

If you open a recording made in an earlier version of Voice Memos (iOS 17 or earlier), Voice Memos will transcribe it automatically if it includes recorded speech.

## View a transcription while recording

1. Go to the Voice Memos app ![](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/91aa29e35113ab1c1f36cd6b872e2534.png) (in the Utilities folder) on your iPhone.

2. Tap ![the Record button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/aa5fb0c1f9cd9ba7e4c6cd91fedbafe8.png) to begin recording.

3. Swipe up from the top of the waveform, then tap ![the Transcription button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/824d8565abd361472f98373116442102.png) to watch the transcription live.

The waveform disappears temporarily, and the transcription appears, with the current word highlighted. To return to the waveform view, tap ![the Transcription button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/824d8565abd361472f98373116442102.png).

4. Tap ![the Pause button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/a767a6d9362ee205eed28ff049e034f4.png) to pause recording; tap Resume to continue.

5. To save the recording, tap ![the Done button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/8cf38aa668e293079ba389088a78ec31.png).

metadata.title: View a Voice Memos transcription on iPhone - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: View a Voice Memos transcription on iPhone - Apple Support]

tap Resume to continue.

5. To save the recording, tap ![the Done button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/8cf38aa668e293079ba389088a78ec31.png).

## View or copy transcribed text after recording

1. Go to the Voice Memos app ![](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/91aa29e35113ab1c1f36cd6b872e2534.png) (in the Utilities folder) on your iPhone.

2. Tap the recording with the transcript you want to view.

3. Tap ![the More button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/b13484b9c117e265757964379180e036.png), then do one of the following:

   - _Copy part of the transcript:_ Choose View Transcript, select the text you want to copy, then tap Copy.

   - _Copy the entire transcript:_ Choose Copy Transcript.

You can open another document—a Mail message or text file, for example—and paste the text into it.

With Apple Intelligence,\* you can use Writing Tools to summarize transcripts with a tap, proofread your work, and find just the right wording and tone. See [Use Writing Tools with Apple Intelligence](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/find-the-right-words-with-writing-tools-iph6f08da1d2/26/ios/26).

## Search for text in titles and transcriptions

1. Go to the Voice Memos app ![](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/91aa29e35113ab1c1f36cd6b872e2534.png) (in the Utilities folder) on your iPhone.

2. Swipe down from the top of the list of recordings to show the search field.

3. In the search field, enter the text you want to find.

The list shows only recordings with that text—either in the title or in the audio transcription.

When you select a term in the transcription, the playhead appears at that location in the audio waveform. To return to the waveform, tap ![the Transcription button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/824d8565abd361472f98373116442102.png).

**See also** [Play a recording in Voice Memos on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/play-it-back-iphebbd067ce/26/ios/26)

# View your data in Health on iPhone

You can view your health and fitness information in one place. For example, you can check whether your metrics change over time, and see how well you’re meeting goals for activity, sleep, mindfulness, and more.

## Customize your pinned health categories on the Summary screen

You can pin and arrange the health categories that are most important to you, like Medications, Heart Rate, Steps, and more.

1. Go to the Health app ![](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/9778c09654aad90365a961606974a385.png) on your iPhone.

2. Tap Summary, then tap Edit next to Pinned.

3. Do any of the following:

   - _Pin a health category:_ Tap ![the Pin button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/d79f7826dfa028791c38f5982764749a.png) next to a category.

   - _Unpin a health category:_ Tap ![the Delete button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/c9919e3723f54a73de9bba2187445f66.png) next to a category.

   - _Reorder the health categories in your Pinned list:_ Drag ![the Reorder button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/705a0755aace2f1e01e2a1ffe986c224.png) next to an category up or down.
4. When you’re finished, tap ![the Done button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/8cf38aa668e293079ba389088a78ec31.png).

metadata.title: View your data in Health on iPhone - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: View your data in Health on iPhone - Apple Support]

to an category up or down.
4. When you’re finished, tap ![the Done button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/8cf38aa668e293079ba389088a78ec31.png).

## View your highlights

1. Go to the Health app ![](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/9778c09654aad90365a961606974a385.png) on your iPhone.

2. Tap Summary, then scroll down to Highlights to see highlights of your recent health and fitness data.

3. Do the following:

   - _View more data about a highlight:_ Tap its graph.

   - _View all highlights:_ Tap Show All Highlights.

## View your health trends

To help you keep track of your health data over time, Health can alert you to significant changes in types of data like resting heart rate, number of steps, and amount of sleep. Trend lines show you how much these metrics have changed and for how long.

1. Go to the Health app ![](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/9778c09654aad90365a961606974a385.png) on your iPhone.

2. Tap Summary, then scroll down to Trends to view any recent trends.

3. If Health has detected trends, you can do the following:

   - _View more data about a trend:_ Tap its graph.

   - _View all trends:_ Tap Show All Health Trends.

To [receive notifications](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/view-and-respond-to-notifications-iph6534c01bc/26/ios/26) about your health trends, tap Summary, tap your picture or initials at the top right, tap Notifications, then turn on Trends.

metadata.title: View your data in Health on iPhone - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: View your data in Health on iPhone - Apple Support]

om/guide/iphone/view-and-respond-to-notifications-iph6534c01bc/26/ios/26) about your health trends, tap Summary, tap your picture or initials at the top right, tap Notifications, then turn on Trends.

## View trends, highlights, and details for a specific health category

1. Go to the Health app ![](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/9778c09654aad90365a961606974a385.png) on your iPhone.

2. Tap ![the Search button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/3506e345e882236df240ce6ef039212b.png) at the bottom right to display the Health Categories screen, then do one of the following:

   - Tap a category. (To see all categories, scroll up and down.)

   - Tap the search field, then type the name of a category (such as Mobility) or a specific type of data (such as Walking Speed).
3. Depending on the data type, you may be able to do the following:

   - _View details about any of the data:_ Tap ![the Details button](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/465382cdc77d9a7ae9a6a530f3a2e55d.png).

   - _See weekly, monthly, and yearly views of the data:_ Tap the tabs at the top of the screen.

   - _Manually enter data:_ Tap Add Data in the top-right corner of the screen.

   - _Pin to the Summary screen:_ Tap Pin to Summary. (You may need to scroll down.)

   - _View which apps and devices are allowed to share the data:_ Below Options, tap Data Sources & Access. (You may need to scroll down.)

   - _Delete data:_ Tap Show All Data below Options, swipe left on a data record, then tap Delete. To delete all data, tap Edit, then tap Delete All.

   - _Change the measurement unit:_ Tap Unit below Options, then select a unit.

   - _Change the measurement unit:_ Tap Unit below Options, then select a unit.

## Learn more about health and fitness

1. Go to the Health app ![](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/9778c09654aad90365a961606974a385.png) on your iPhone.

2. Tap Summary, then scroll down to Get More From Health or Articles.

3. Tap an item to learn more.

When you view the details in many health categories, recommended apps are shown in addition to your data.

**See also** [Intro to Health data on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/intro-to-health-data-iphbb8259c61/26/ios/26) [Share your data in Health on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/share-your-health-data-iph5ede58c3d/26/ios/26)

## Get started

Set up a few basic features before you start using your new iPhone.

[Setup basics](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/setup-basics-iph9374b7411/18.0/ios/18.0)

![The iPhone Home Screen. Apps appear in the same color at the bottom of the screen, and complement the color in the wallpaper photo.](https://help.apple.com/assets/683A54F5227CBBDB98051B96/683A54FC545676DF600F97D4/en_US/7fe62742e4c81754dd2e7310a777108d.png)

## Add a personal touch

Your iPhone can reflect your personal style and preferences. Showcase your favorite photos on the Lock Screen, add widgets to the Home Screen, adjust text size, ringtones, and more.

[Make your iPhone your own](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/make-your-iphone-your-own-iphefb3daa42/18.0/ios/18.0)

![The Camera screen in Photo mode, showing four people in the Camera frame.](https://help.apple.com/assets/683A54F5227CBBDB98051B96/683A54FC545676DF600F97D4/en_US/f61d6d4ddb9968bd8c1b2259a65624af.png)

## Take your best shot

Use your iPhone to capture the moment, wherever you are. Learn how to take photos and videos on the fly, and use other camera features on your iPhone.

[Take great photos and videos](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/take-great-photos-and-videos-iph9bbc8619e/18.0/ios/18.0)

![A FaceTime call.](https://help.apple.com/assets/683A54F5227CBBDB98051B96/683A54FC545676DF600F97D4/en_US/9264f98c32529f60a757f24138eec0c7.png)

ke-great-photos-and-videos-iph9bbc8619e/18.0/ios/18.0)

## Stay connected

iPhone makes it easy to reach the people important to you. Add them to your contacts so you have their information everywhere you need it—then catch up with text messages, phone calls, or FaceTime.

[Keep in touch with friends and family](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/keep-in-touch-with-friends-and-family-iph41060df75/18.0/ios/18.0)

![The Family Sharing screen in Settings. Five family members are listed. Below their names are the Family Checklist and below that are the Subscriptions and Purchase Sharing options.](https://help.apple.com/assets/683A54F5227CBBDB98051B96/683A54FC545676DF600F97D4/en_US/9d2c1c3315fe6d676a8820067f1115cc.png)

## All in the family

You and your family members can use Family Sharing to share eligible app purchases, your location, and even health data. You can also choose a family member or someone you trust to help you regain access to your iPhone if you forget your passcode.

[Share features with your family](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/share-features-with-your-family-iph023f98729/18.0/ios/18.0)

![The My Home screen in the Home app.](https://help.apple.com/assets/683A54F5227CBBDB98051B96/683A54FC545676DF600F97D4/en_US/585c7d252ff20b29a045b774f7f8ebf5.png)

## Simplify your day

Learn how to use the apps on your iPhone to direct you to the places you go most often, pay for your morning coffee, remind you of important tasks, and even lock your front door automatically when you leave home.

[Use iPhone for your daily routines](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/use-iphone-for-your-daily-routines-iph556acc36f/18.0/ios/18.0)

![An iPhone screen showing the battery charged 100%.](https://help.apple.com/assets/683A54F5227CBBDB98051B96/683A54FC545676DF600F97D4/en_US/0227ba6ceabac2f23db864dfc2d87cea.png)

metadata.title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support]

# What’s new in iOS 26

**Lock Screen.** The time dynamically adapts its position based on your Lock Screen photo or wallpaper and always keeps the subject in view. When you move your iPhone, your Lock Screen photo comes to life with a new 3D effect. See [Create a custom iPhone Lock Screen](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/create-a-custom-lock-screen-iph4d0e6c351/26/ios/26).

![The iPhone Lock Screen.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/22e149f75fab72b818e2bb626c6c986a.png)

**Home Screen.** App icons on your Home Screen have a new look that you can tint with different colors or turn light, dark, or clear. See [Customize apps and widgets on the iPhone Home Screen](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/customize-apps-and-widgets-on-the-home-screen-iph385473442/26/ios/26).

![The iPhone Home Screen with tinted app icons.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/85ab08a62030702fec17ed3a4ad33295.png)

**Apple Intelligence.\*** Create custom Genmoji using existing emoji, combinations of emoji, or descriptive text. Change the look and expressions of Genmoji and Image Playground creations that are based on people from your Photos library. Design custom backgrounds for your Messages conversations. Live Translation automatically translates texts in Messages, shows live translated captions in FaceTime calls, and provides spoken translations for Phone calls. Use visual intelligence to learn more about what you’re viewing on your iPhone screen. See [Create original images with Image Playground on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/create-original-images-with-image-playground-iph0063238b5/26/ios/26), [Create your own emoji with Genmoji on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/create-your-own-emoji-with-genmoji-iph4e76f5667/26/ios/26), [Create and edit original backgrounds with Image Playground](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/use-apple-intelligence-in-messages-iph64709c5c3/26/ios/26#iph4452ecda1), [Translate messages, calls, and conversations on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/translate-messages-calls-and-conversations-iph22b72984d/26/ios/26), and [Learn more about the content on your iPhone screen](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/use-visual-intelligence-iph12eb1545e/26/ios/26#iph4d370546c).

![A phone call in the Phone app showing a conversation translated from German to English.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8E

metadata.title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support]

ide/iphone/use-visual-intelligence-iph12eb1545e/26/ios/26#iph4d370546c).

![A phone call in the Phone app showing a conversation translated from German to English.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/1c2fd16f1965495585825ad9e0c115b4.png)

**Camera.** A simplified design highlights Photo and Video modes for quick access, while the other camera modes are just a swipe away. Camera controls are now grouped together onscreen, making it easier to adjust your camera settings in the moment. See [Switch between camera modes](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/camera-basics-iph263472f78/26/ios/26#iphac6618d52) and [Use iPhone camera tools to set up your shot](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/set-up-your-shot-iph3dc593597/26/ios/26).

![The Camera in Photo mode. At the bottom of the screen are buttons for the following camera controls: Flash, Live, Timer, Exposure, Styles, and Aspect.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/a26844541dfb79fc497d82164d0d95df.png)

**Phone.** Remove unwanted distractions from unknown numbers with Call Screening, which gathers the necessary information before your phone rings, so you can make an informed decision on whether to pick up, decline, or ask for more information. Use Hold Assist to wait on hold for you and then send you a notification when it’s time to return to the call. See [Screen and block calls on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/screen-and-block-calls-iphe4b3f7823/26/ios/26) and [Receive a notification when you’re no longer on hold](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/while-on-a-call-iph3c9951d7/26/ios/26#iph03769ccb5).

![The Phone app shows a call in progress on the iPhone screen. In the middle of the screen is a notification asking whether to hold the call and be notified when to pick up. Within the notification is a Hold button and a Close button.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/7dc43f4995345692f30e34a5efe8b8c0.png)

**Messages.** Messages from unknown numbers are filtered into a separate area of your conversation list for you to review and approve. Backgrounds let you personalize conversations for everyone to enjoy using dynamic backgrounds, your own photos, or backgrounds you create in Image Playground. In group conversations, you can create polls to help make decisions, send money using Apple Cash, and see typing indicators. See [Screen a

metadata.title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support]

ur own photos, or backgrounds you create in Image Playground. In group conversations, you can create polls to help make decisions, send money using Apple Cash, and see typing indicators. See [Screen and filter text messages on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/screen-and-filter-texts-iph203ab0be4/26/ios/26), [Add backgrounds in Messages on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/add-backgrounds-iph605fa06e4/26/ios/26), [Send, request, and receive payments with Apple Cash in Messages](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/use-apple-cash-iph385cf0980/26/ios/26#iphb7f1ac4be), and [Poll people in Messages on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/poll-people-in-a-conversation-iphde1787df4/26/ios/26).

![A Messages conversation with a dynamic background.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/9704d790abc952ddc2dcd86f578dafe9.png)

**Photos.** An updated design makes it easier to switch between your Library and Collections. You can now customize how Collections appear—reorder them, choose which ones to pin, and select from three display sizes: larger tiles, a denser grid, or a layout that highlights the top row. See [Browse your photo library on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/browse-your-photo-library-iph7d24753a5/26/ios/26) and [Browse your photo collections on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/browse-your-photo-collections-iph4f36c4148/26/ios/26).

![The Library screen in the Photos app.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/6c0c1af2cf439f969cee40af356f077a.png)

**Maps.** Maps learns your preferred routes to places you go often, like work or home. Maps will notify you of conditions on your preferred route, such as traffic delays or road closures, before you head out and offer you an alternate route. Use Visited Places to keep track of where you’ve been, so you can recall them later and share with friends or family. See [Get driving directions in Maps on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/get-driving-directions-ipha84a94043/26/ios/26) and [View and manage Visited Places in Maps on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/view-and-manage-visited-places-iph0c2597c4f/26/ios/26).

![The Visited Places screen in the Maps app.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/e3c93ede889cda47551045ff0c7ff716.png)

**Games.** A new app where you can keep track

metadata.title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support]

ces screen in the Maps app.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/e3c93ede889cda47551045ff0c7ff716.png)

**Games.** A new app where you can keep track of all the games you’re playing, discover new ones, receive tailored recommendations, and start challenges with friends. See [Get started with the Apple Games app on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/get-started-with-the-apple-games-app-iph3aed54d2e/26/ios/26).

![The Apple Games app showing the Home tab, which displays a special event, games to continue playing, and new releases.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/158c11dce5b010c741943e50bf3ccc72.png)

**Audio recording.** Capture high-quality audio and video during video conference calls and with Camera. A new input chooser makes it easy for creators to pick the right microphone for each app. See [Record audio and video on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/record-audio-and-video-iph8dc8a5c3c/26/ios/26).

![The controls for choosing an audio input source for a FaceTime call.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/41fed1b05de4675194334c3ce27d487e.png)

**Music.** AutoMix seamlessly mixes one song to the next, just like a DJ. See [Adjust the sound quality in Music on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/adjust-the-sound-quality-iph5643d2c85/26/ios/26).

**Reminders.** (iOS 26.2) Mark a reminder as urgent to set an alarm that alerts you when it’s due. See [Add details in Reminders on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/add-details-iphec7a1de82/26/ios/26).

**Wallet.** Boarding passes that you save in Wallet provide access to relevant information about your flight and airport, as well as airline app features. See [Use passes in Wallet on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/use-passes-loyalty-cards-tickets-and-more-iphe7aa3336/26/ios/26).

![A boarding pass in the Wallet app, showing flight information and the QR code at the bottom.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/92d772c887abc0d2bf8ba26d722cab7d.png)

**Digital ID.** (iOS 26.1) In Wallet, create a Digital ID—a passport-verified ID that you can present at select TSA checkpoints in airports for domestic travel, or in supported apps or websites that require age verification. See [Add a Digital ID (U.S. only)](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/add-your-

metadata.title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support]

ect TSA checkpoints in airports for domestic travel, or in supported apps or websites that require age verification. See [Add a Digital ID (U.S. only)](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/add-your-id-iph9f1847064/26/ios/26#iph3a659f49e).

**Preview.** The Preview app is now available on iPhone so you can easily view, edit, and share PDF documents and images. Scan documents from within Preview, use Autofill in Preview to quickly fill out forms, and export PDFs and images as different file types or sizes. See [Get started with Preview on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/get-started-with-preview-on-iphone-iph7239ea3b5/26/ios/26).

![The Document Browser in Preview. In the middle of the screen are the New Document, Scan Documents, More, and Search buttons. At the bottom of the screen are the Recents, Shared, and Browse buttons.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/843a37f313390e42400d280036d8dd4d.png)

**Clock.** Set a custom snooze time for your alarm to match your preferred sleeping habits. See [Set an alarm](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/set-an-alarm-iph2909d3a74/26/ios/26#iph600d94a8a).

![The Add Alarm screen in the Clock app. The Snooze is turned on and the Snooze Duration is set to a custom time of 12 minutes.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/8a2716ede5bacd60b4cbed023845f2b4.png)

**Accessibility.** Braille Access introduces an all-new experience designed for Braille users with a connected Braille display that enables note-taking, document-reading, access to Live Captions and more. Vehicle Motion Cues help reduce motion sickness for passengers in moving vehicles. You can also temporarily use your Accessibility settings on someone else’s device. See [Use Braille Access with a braille display on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/use-braille-access-with-a-braille-display-iph5953d3c7a/26/ios/26), [Use iPhone more comfortably while riding in a vehicle](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/iphone-comfortably-riding-a-vehicle-iph55564cb22/26/ios/26), and [Share your Accessibility settings with another device on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/share-accessibility-settings-device-ipha21bc67e7/26/ios/26).

![An iPhone with the Braille Access menu open, showing the following options: Launch App, Choose Item, Braille Notes, BRF Files, Calculator, Live Captions, and Time.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EB

metadata.title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: What’s new in iOS 26 - Apple Support]

n iPhone with the Braille Access menu open, showing the following options: Launch App, Choose Item, Braille Notes, BRF Files, Calculator, Live Captions, and Time.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/4d66ea32783f6c9343bf46af395e7a8f.png)

**Family.** During device set up, parents can specify if they are setting up a device for an older child, age 13–17, and age-appropriate protections are automatically enabled. See [Share age ranges with apps on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/share-age-ranges-with-apps-iphe56aab53d/26/ios/26).

![The onboarding screen for Age-Appropriate Experiences in Apps features.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/a9609e0ba89ee206a7f8554b37c25699.png)

**Journal.** Create multiple journals for different aspects of your life. As you write, include drawings inline with text, and then view the location of your journal entries on a map. See [Create multiple journals](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/write-in-your-journal-iph9824e83ce/26/ios/26#iph025e225ef), [Add formatting, photos, and more in Journal on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/add-formatting-photos-and-more-iph492ee70a8/26/ios/26), and [View and search your journal entries on iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/view-and-search-journal-entries-iph6257be047/26/ios/26).

![The Journal app showing a journal entry. At the top of the entry is a grid which includes multiple photos and a map.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/2aa68335cc45ce470339aa14b41b975d.png)

**CarPlay.** New design makes CarPlay an easier and safer way to use your iPhone while you drive. Tapbacks in Messages make it easy to quickly respond to messages you receive while driving. Widgets let you keep up with your favorite apps at a glance and Live Activities on the dashboard let you keep track of events in real time. See [React with Tapbacks](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/send-and-receive-text-messages-iphb5d45624c/26/ios/26#iphcb39496c2), [Add a widget for CarPlay](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/customize-widgets-iphb4d6a0bbb/26/ios/26#iph252139641), and [View Live Activities in CarPlay](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/view-live-activities-iph3d92302ee/26/ios/26).

**Weather.** Add a Weather widget to your Smart Stack for an upcoming destination. Opt-in to receive severe weather alerts for tha

apple.com/guide/iphone/view-live-activities-iph3d92302ee/26/ios/26).

**Weather.** Add a Weather widget to your Smart Stack for an upcoming destination. Opt-in to receive severe weather alerts for that location. See [Get weather notifications for a suggested location](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/manage-weather-notifications-iph39ae9474a/26/ios/26#iphdf5879d46).

**Learn tricks for iOS 26.** The Tips app adds new suggestions regularly, so you can get the most from your iPhone. See [Get tips](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/tips-iph3afc3b3fc/26/ios/26).

_Note:_ New features and apps may vary depending on your iPhone model, region, language, and carrier.

![The Welcome screen that appears when you first set up your iPhone.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/e26f11e71df6a9f5c3193f2665af083a.png)

## Get started

Set up a few basic features before you start using your new iPhone.

[Setup basics](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/setup-basics-iph9374b7411/26/ios/26)

![The iPhone Lock Screen with a personal photo set as the background image.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/f9d58cce429bf183f0024dbc2d1d5275.png)

## Add a personal touch

Your iPhone can reflect your personal style and preferences. Showcase your favorite photos on the Lock Screen, add widgets to the Home Screen, adjust text size, ringtones, and more.

[Make your iPhone your own](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/make-your-iphone-your-own-iphefb3daa42/26/ios/26)

![The Camera screen in Photo mode. Within the camera frame, the subjects are taking a selfie.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/63a30edb82cad5b714e57838c716e23c.png)

## Take your best shot

Use your iPhone to capture the moment, wherever you are. Learn how to take photos and videos on the fly, and use other camera features on your iPhone.

[Take great photos and videos](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/take-great-photos-and-videos-iph9bbc8619e/26/ios/26)

![A Group FaceTime call with five participants. Each participant appears in a separate tile. The FaceTime controls are at the bottom-right side of the screen.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/139fe6dbb8d4a0dfec3620813a975edd.png)

metadata.title: iPhone User Guide - Apple Support

text:
[Source: apple_support] [Title: iPhone User Guide - Apple Support]

te tile. The FaceTime controls are at the bottom-right side of the screen.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/139fe6dbb8d4a0dfec3620813a975edd.png)

## Stay connected

iPhone makes it easy to reach the people important to you. Add them to your contacts so you have their information everywhere you need it—then catch up with text messages, phone calls, or FaceTime.

[Keep in touch with friends and family](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/keep-in-touch-with-friends-and-family-iph41060df75/26/ios/26)

![The Family Sharing screen in Settings. Five family members are listed. Below their names are the Family Checklist and below that are the Subscriptions and Purchase Sharing options.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/86309a67cb23199c539e0ab2b0eaf5c7.png)

## All in the family

You and your family members can use Family Sharing to share eligible app purchases, your location, and even health data. You can also choose a family member or someone you trust to help you regain access to your iPhone if you forget your passcode.

[Share features with your family](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/share-features-with-your-family-iph023f98729/26/ios/26)

![The My Home screen in the Home app.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/8edc93a984ed37d6571bb268d2dda133.png)

## Simplify your day

Learn how to use the apps on your iPhone to direct you to the places you go most often, pay for your morning coffee, remind you of important tasks, and even lock your front door automatically when you leave home.

[Use iPhone for your daily routines](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/use-iphone-for-your-daily-routines-iph556acc36f/26/ios/26)

![An iPhone screen showing the battery charged 100%.](https://help.apple.com/assets/69F8EBBDF3B89A4F6E0C704C/69F8EBC43862495245036393/en_US/08e0e2cd9d8e105b934a3759ec903b58.png)
